channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PYXISFIN] Pyxis Finvest Approves Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
Pyxis Finvest Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results (Standalone) for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026, in their meeting held on May 18, 2026. The audit report, conducted by Bharat Gupta & Co., Chartered Accountants, contains an unmodified opinion on the standalone audited financial statements. The board has confirmed that the financial results do not contain any false or misleading statements.

  • Pyxis Finvest approved audited financial results for FY26 on May 18, 2026.
  • The results are for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Auditors Bharat Gupta & Co. issued an unmodified opinion.
  • The board confirms the results are free of false or misleading statements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pyxis Finvest Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PYXISFIN] Pyxis Finvest Approves Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
Pyxis Finvest Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026, during a meeting held on May 18, 2026. The audit report, issued by Bharat Gupta & Co., Chartered Accountants, contains an unmodified opinion on the financial statements. The company confirms that the financial results do not contain any false or misleading statements.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved by the board on May 18, 2026.
  • Bharat Gupta & Co. issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion.
  • The financial results are compliant with SEBI regulations.
  • Uttam Bagri, CFO, certifies the accuracy of the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pyxis Finvest Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SIMRAN] Simran Farms: Update PAN, KYC for Physical Share Holders
item.description:
Simran Farms Ltd. is requesting holders of physical shares to update their PAN, KYC, Bank Account Details, Contact Details, and Nomination information. This is to comply with SEBI regulations and ensure seamless communication and dividend payments. Shareholders who do not update their information may face restrictions on lodging grievances and will receive payments electronically only.

  • Simran Farms requests physical shareholders to update PAN, KYC, and bank details.
  • Update is mandatory per SEBI regulations for seamless communication.
  • Payments, including dividends, will be made electronically from April 1, 2024, for updated folios.
  • Shareholders can update details via forms ISR-1, ISR-2, SH-13, and SH-14.
  • Failure to update may restrict grievance lodging and service requests.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIMRAN FARMS LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [ARCFIN] ARC Finance Board Meeting on May 29, 2026
item.description:
ARC Finance Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 29, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the appointment of Mr. Akhil Agarwal as Secretarial Auditor and O P Khajanchi & Co. as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27. The trading window remains closed until 48 hours after the financial results are declared.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Appointment of Secretarial Auditor for FY 2026-27 to be considered.
  • Appointment of Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27 to be considered.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours after results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARC Finance Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GENUSPAPER] Genus Paper Board Meeting on May 26, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Genus Paper & Boards Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 26, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the financial results are publicly available.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 26, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours post results announcement.
  • Decision pertains to quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Genus Paper & Boards Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DEEPAKNI] Deepak Nitrite Uploads Q4 & FY26 Earnings Call Audio Recording
item.description:
Deepak Nitrite Ltd. has uploaded the audio recording of its Q4 & FY 2026 earnings conference call held on May 18, 2026. The recording is available on the company's website under the financial results section.

  • Deepak Nitrite has uploaded the audio recording of its Q4 & FY26 earnings call.
  • The earnings conference call was held on May 18, 2026.
  • The audio recording is available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DEEPAK NITRITE LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HERITGFOOD] Heritage Foods to Participate in 360 ONE Capital Investor Conference
item.description:
Heritage Foods Ltd announced that its Senior Management will participate in the "360 ONE Capital (B&K) 16th Annual Investor Conference - Trinity India 2026" in Mumbai on May 28, 2026. The participation involves one-on-one meetings and group meetings with analysts and investors. The company has confirmed that no unpublished price-sensitive information will be shared during the meetings. This event is in compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Heritage Foods' Senior Management to attend 360 ONE Capital Investor Conference.
  • The conference includes one-on-one and group meetings with investors.
  • The event will be held in Mumbai on May 28, 2026.
  • No unpublished price-sensitive information will be disclosed.
  • Participation complies with SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Heritage Foods Limited | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MEFCOMCAP] Mefcom Capital Board Meeting on May 27, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Mefcom Capital Markets Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 27, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Standalone & Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. In compliance with SEBI regulations, the trading window for dealing in the company's shares is closed for all insiders from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled on May 27, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Results are for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed for insiders from April 1, 2026.
  • Closure extends until 48 hours after results declaration as per SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MEFCOM CAPITAL MARKETS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JAYNECOIND] Jayaswal Neco to Participate in India Manthan 2026 Conference
item.description:
Jayaswal Neco Industries Ltd announced that a senior management official will participate in the Investor Conference 'India Manthan 2026', organized by Yes Securities. The conference will be held on May 21, 2026, at Hotel Aurika, Mumbai, with meetings scheduled from 9:00 A.M. to 5:00 P.M. The company will discuss publicly available information and will not share any Unpublished Price Sensitive Information (UPSI) during the meetings. The schedule is subject to change due to exigencies.

  • Jayaswal Neco to participate in 'India Manthan 2026' investor conference.
  • Conference organized by Yes Securities on May 21, 2026, in Mumbai.
  • Senior management will meet with analysts and institutional investors.
  • Only public domain information will be discussed.
  • Meeting schedule is subject to change.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JAYASWAL NECO INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RKDAGRRTL] RKD Agri & Retail Board Meeting Scheduled for May 26, 2026
item.description:
RKD Agri & Retail Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 26, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the appointment of an Internal Auditor for FY 2026-2027 and a Secretarial Auditor for FY 2025-2026.

  • Board meeting on May 26, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Appointment of Internal Auditor for FY 2026-2027 to be considered.
  • Appointment of Secretarial Auditor for FY 2025-2026 to be considered.
  • Meeting will be held at 4:00 PM at the company's registered office.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RKD Agri & Retail Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
